message.content:
**Title (Titolo):** GUCCI Neo Vintage Mini Bag
**Subtitle (Sottotitolo):** Timeless Elegance in Beige and Ebony
**Short Description (Breve Descrizione):** Embrace the essence of vintage luxury with the GUCCI Neo Vintage Mini Bag, featuring a striking beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas. This compact yet stylish accessory is adorned with brown and yellow leather details, adding a touch of sophistication to any outfit. Perfect for those who appreciate classic elegance with a modern twist.

**Description (Descrizione):**

- **Craftsmanship and Materials:**
  • Made from high-quality GG Supreme canvas, a material chosen for its low environmental impact.
  • Brown and yellow leather details add a luxurious touch.
  • The interior is lined with cotton linen for a soft and durable finish.

- **Design Elements:**
  • The bag features an oval Gucci leather tag with a feline head motif, a nod to the brand's iconic style.
  • Adjustable leather strap with a 19.7″ drop, allowing for versatile wear.
  • Zipper closure ensures secure storage.
  • 1 external pocket and 2 internal flap pockets with button closures provide ample space for essentials.

- **Size and Capacity:**
  • Dimensions: 4.7″W x 6.3″H x 2.8″D.
  • Can fit a cell phone up to 3″W x 6″H x .3″D.
  • Model is 6’1″ tall, providing a scale reference.

- **Authenticity and Origin:**
  • Model number: 658556 K9GOT 8861.
  • Made in Italy, ensuring the highest standards of craftsmanship.

This GUCCI Neo Vintage Mini Bag is a testament to the brand's commitment to blending timeless style with modern sensibilities, making it a must-have accessory for those who appreciate luxury and sustainability.
